title: 💻 Claude Code: Anthropic Academy: Claude API Development Guide
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Build with Claude. Start developing Claude-powered applications with our comprehensive API guides and best practices. Learn how to harness the intelligence and capability of our latest models, Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Claude Opus 4.5. #### Get started with APIs. Square with connected circular nodes on corners. Speed up your development with Claude Code. Black outline of hand arranging geometric shapes. Extend Claude's capabilities by connecting to external tools and APIs. Improve Claude's ability to solve complex tasks by allowing it to reason. Build effective RAG systems to enhance Claude's responses with external data. Pencil connecting two circular nodes. Create effective prompts that maximize Claude's performance. Test and improve Claude's performance with structured evaluations. Outline of hand forming circle shape with eye symbol. Learn how to use Claude models to interact with a computer desktop environment. Resources to help you get started with Claude, whether you're hacking with us at an event or on your own. ### Claude Platform.

content:

[Skip to main content](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/blog/claude-code-best-practices-lessons-from-real-projects/#main-content). ![Image 3: Claude Code Best Practices: Lessons From Real Projects](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/images/blog/claude-code-best-practices-lessons-from-real-projects/image-01.webp). *   1.1 Project 1: Rebuilding ranthebuilder.cloud with Claude Code. | AI SDLC | [BMAD Method](https://github.com/bmadcode/BMAD-METHOD) for large projects, Claude Code plan mode for smaller features |. ![Image 5: Propel Kanban board showing Backlog, In Progress, Blocked, and Completed columns with task cards](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/images/blog/claude-code-best-practices-lessons-from-real-projects/image-02.webp). When I built it, I used Claude Code alongside [BMAD](https://github.com/bmadcode/BMAD-METHOD), an [AI SDLC framework](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/blog/ai-driven-sdlc/) that guides you through product design, user flows, and specifications before you write a single line of code. ![Image 6: BMAD available commands table showing brainstorming, party mode, help, and review workflows](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/images/blog/claude-code-best-practices-lessons-from-real-projects/image-03.webp). ![Image 7: BMAD brainstorming session complete with 36 ideas, MVP scope, and 4-phase roadmap](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/images/blog/claude-code-best-practices-lessons-from-real-projects/image-04.webp). ![Image 8: mac-folder-sync menu bar app showing sync status, last sync time, and configuration options](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/images/blog/claude-code-best-practices-lessons-from-real-projects/image-05.webp). ![Image 9: A comic page drawn in dog-man style featuring a cat with acid poop superpowers](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/images/blog/claude-code-best-practices-lessons-from-real-projects/image-06.webp). A real experiment on AI, buy vs build, and why SaaS isn’t dead but rapidly evolving.](https://ranthebuilder.cloud/blog/claude-built-my-wix-website-in-3-hours-is-saas-dead/).

title: 💻 Claude Code: Prompting best practices - Claude API Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

For API parameter changes when migrating from Claude Opus 4.6 (effort levels, task budgets, thinking configuration, sampling-parameter removal, and tokenization), see the [migration guide](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/models/migration-guide#migrating-to-claude-opus-4-7). 4.   **Update thinking configuration**: Claude 4.6 models use [adaptive thinking](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/adaptive-thinking) (`thinking: {type: "adaptive"}`) instead of manual thinking with `budget_tokens`. Use the [effort parameter](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/effort) to control thinking depth. *   [Calibrating effort and thinking title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format text. claude -p "Process this large dataset" --output-format stream-json`. claude -p "Analyze this code" --output-format json | jq -r '.result'. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format json | jq '.usage'`. session_id=$(claude -p "Start review" --output-format json \. claude -p "Continue the review" --resume "$session_id"`. claude -p "Review the code" \. - claude -p "Analyze maintainability issues" --output-format json. - claude -p "Check for performance bottlenecks" --output-format json. Claude Code's batch processing is built on two pillars: `/batch` and headless mode (`claude -p`). Claude Code v2.1.63 Release Notes — `/batch` and `/simplify` were introduced in this version.

title: 💻 Claude Code /simplify and /batch Commands Guide
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code /simplify and /batch: Bundled Commands That Ship Code Faster. Claude Code /simplify runs 3-agent code review on your changes. Boris Cherny, the Claude Code PM, put it well: these bundled commands "automate much of the work it used to take to shepherd a pull request to production." `/simplify` is the automated code review step between "it works" and "it's ready to merge.". Claude Code's `/batch` command orchestrates large-scale changes across your codebase in parallel. `/simplify` and `/batch` are bundled Claude Code commands -- they ship with every installation and work out of the box. `/simplify` and `/batch` shipped in Claude Code v2.1.63. `/simplify` and `/batch` signal where Claude Code is headed: bundled multi-agent workflows that handle common engineering patterns out of the box. If you want a development framework with pre-built agent orchestration, custom slash commands, and multi-agent patterns that work alongside these bundled commands, the ClaudeFast Code Kit ships with 18 specialized agents and a pipeline designed for exactly this kind of workflow.
